answers.body:
You should iterate trough all cells. If you want get value from current cell you can call getValue()

result.getCell( new int[]{0,0} ).getValue()

But to get all values you must iterate like that:

          Axis[] axes = result.getAxes();          
          int[] pos = new int[2];
          pos[1] = 0;
          for (Position position : axes[1].getPositions())
          {
             for (int i=0; i< axes[0].getPositions().size(); i++)
             {
                pos[0] = i;
                result.getCell(pos).getValue();
             }
             pos[1] += 1;
          }

title: Getting data from mondrian.olap.Result
body:
I want to store the values of result set in a variable.

Here is my code:

mondrian.rolap.RolapConnection connection=(RolapConnection) 
RGHelper.getMDXConnection();
Query query = connection.parseQuery(topNUtilisedRG);
    
@SuppressWarnings("deprecation")
Result result = connection.execute(query);

I tried to get the result using:

final Cell cell = result.getCell( new int[]{0,0} );

I am using eclipse debugging and I found that all records which I need are present in "cell" variable. But I don't know how to fetch data.

In this image I mentioned values which I want save in some variable:

I have gone through this site, but I didn't get the right solution
